1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: properly, to be erect (i.e. stand perpendicular); hence (causatively) to set up, in a great variety of applications, whether literal (establish, fix, prepare, apply), or figurative (appoint, render sure, proper or prospe
2.kj: certain(-ty), confirm, direct, faithfulness, fashion, fasten, firm, be fitted, be fixed, frame, be meet, ordain, order, perfect, (make) preparation, prepare (self), provide, make p

2.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
2.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: play upon it; to make music, accompanied by the voice; hence to celebrate in song and music
2.kj: give praise, sing forth praises, psalms.
2.dv: a primitive root (perhaps identical with H2168 (זָמַר) through the idea of striking with the fingers); properly, to touch the strings or parts of a mu

2.gl: meaning accession (used as an adverb or conjunction); also or yea; adversatively though
2.kj: also, [phrase] although, and (furthermore, yet), but, even, [phrase] how much less (more, rather than), moreover, with, yea.
behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).
2.dv: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy);

3.gl: a skin-bag for liquids (from collapsing when empty); hence, a vase (as similar in shape when full); also a lyre (as having a body of like form)

3.kj: (a-) wake(-n, up), lift up (self), [idiom] master, raise (up), stir up (self).
3.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with through the idea of opening the eyes);

3.kj: day(-spring), early, light, morning, whence riseth.

3.dv: from a unused root meaning to twang;

4.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
4.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

4.gl: play upon it; to make music, accompanied by the voice; hence to celebrate in song and music
4.kj: give praise, sing forth praises, psalms.
4.dv: a primitive root (perhaps identical with H2168 (זָמַר) through the idea of striking with the fingers); properly, to touch the strings or parts of a mu

4.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
4.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.

4.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

4.dv: or לְאוֹם; from an unused root meaning to gather;

5.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
5.kj: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom]

5.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
5.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

5.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
5.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.
assured(-ly), establishment, faithful, right, sure, true (-ly, -th), verity.

5.gl: a powder (as beaten small); by analogy, a thin vapor; by extension, the firmament

6.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
6.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

6.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
6.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

6.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
6.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

6.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
6.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
6.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

6.gl: properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness

7.gl: properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce
7.kj: give account, afflict (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), (cause to, give) answer, bring low (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), cry, hear, Leannoth, lift up, say, [idiom] scholar, (give a

7.gl: to pull off; hence (intensively) to strip, (reflex.) to depart; by implication, to deliver, equip (for fight); present, strengthen
7.kj: arm (self), (go, ready) armed ([idiom] man, soldier), deliver, draw out, make fat, loose, (ready) prepared, put off, take away, withdraw self.

7.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
7.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

7.gl: properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that
7.kj: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), [phrase] lest, that, to.

7.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south

8.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
8.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

8.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
8.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

8.gl: to be smooth (figuratively); by implication (as smooth stones were used for lots) to apportion or separate
8.kj: deal, distribute, divide, flatter, give, (have, im-) part(-ner), take away a portion, receive, separate self, (be) smooth(-er).

8.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
8.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

8.gl: properly, to stretch; by implication, to measure (as if by stretching a line); figuratively, to be extended

8.kj: dale, vale, valley (often used as a part of proper names). See also H1025 (בֵּית הָעֵמֶק).

9.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
9.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
9.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

9.gl: properly, to hack, i.e. engrave (Judges 5:14, to be a scribe simply); by implication, to enact (laws being cut in stone or metal tablets in primitive times) or (gen.) prescribe
9.kj: appoint, decree, governor, grave, lawgiver, note, pourtray, print, set.

9.gl: a fortified place; figuratively, a defence
9.kj: force, fort(-ress), rock, strength(-en), ([idiom] most) strong (hold).
9.dv: (also מָעוּז ); or מָעֹז (also מָעֻז; from H5810 (עָזַז);

9.gl: Ephrajim, a son of Joseph; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory
9.dv: dual of masculine form of H672 (אֶפְרָת); double fruit;

9.gl: Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory
Menashsheh, a grandson of Jacob, also the tribe descended from him, and its territory

10.gl: to mar (especially by breaking); figuratively, to split the ears (with sound), i.e. shout (for alarm or joy)
10.kj: blow an alarm, cry (alarm, aloud, out), destroy, make a joyful noise, smart, shout (for joy), sound an alarm, triumph.

10.gl: properly, a sandal tongue; by extension a sandal or slipper (sometimes as a symbol of occupancy, a refusal to marry, or of something valueless)
a pot; also a thorn (as springing up rapidly); by implication, a hook
10.dv: or (feminine) סִירָה; or סִרָה; (Jeremiah 52:18), from a primitive root meaning to boil up;

10.gl: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
10.dv: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father;

10.gl: Edom, the elder twin-brother of Jacob; hence the region (Idumaea) occupied by him
10.dv: or (fully) אֱדוֹם ; from H122 (אָדֹם); red (see Genesis 25:25);

10.gl: to throw out, down or away (literally or figuratively)
10.kj: adventure, cast (away, down, forth, off, out), hurl, pluck, throw.

11.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
11.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
11.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

11.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
11.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
11.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

11.gl: a fortification, castle, or fortified city; figuratively, a defender
11.dv: also (in plural) feminine (Daniel 11:l5) מִבְצָרָה; from H1219 (בָּצַר);

11.gl: Edom, the elder twin-brother of Jacob; hence the region (Idumaea) occupied by him
11.dv: or (fully) אֱדוֹם ; from H122 (אָדֹם); red (see Genesis 25:25);

11.gl: to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists)
11.kj: bestow, bring, govern, guide, lead (forth), put, straiten.

11.gl: properly, to flow; causatively, to bring (especially with pomp)

12.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
12.kj: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depa

12.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
12.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

12.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
12.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

12.dv: a primitive root meaning to push aside, i.e.

13.gl: narrow; (as a noun) a tight place (usually figuratively, i.e. trouble); also a pebble ; (transitive) an opponent (as crowding)
13.kj: adversary, afflicted(-tion), anguish, close, distress, enemy, flint, foe, narrow, small, sorrow, strait, tribulation, trouble.
13.dv: or צָר; from H6887 (צָרַר); compare as in H6864 (צֹר)

13.gl: evil (as destructive), literally (ruin) or morally (especially guile); figuratively idolatry (as false, subjective), uselessness (as deceptive, objective; also adverbially, in vain)
13.dv: or שַׁו; from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא) in the sense of desolating;

13.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
13.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

13.gl: rescue (literal or figurative, persons, national or spiritual)
13.dv: or תְּשֻׁעָה; from H7768 (שָׁוַע) in the sense of H3467 (יָשַׁע);

13.gl: to give (whether literal or figurative); generally, to put; imperatively (reflexive) come
13.kj: ascribe, bring, come on, give, go, set, take.

13.dv: or עֶזְרָת; (Psalm 60:11 (13); Psalm 108:12 (13)), feminine of H5828 (עֵזֶר);
